posts.text: Food markets have been beset by volatility in recent years, due to a pandemic and two wars. Happily, uncertainty can drive disruptive technology  https://www.economist.com/science-and-technology/2026/06/04/feeding-10-billion-people-will-require-new-technology?taid=6a257003b18938000151f4bf&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

posts.text:
From @hkuppy: "Some just think that semis are somehow special. I can assure you they’re not any more special than solar panels were. The Chinese are coming, and the glut will be legendary"
